programme.title: Dudaktan Kalbe
programme.desc:
ŤĄļnlÁúČ mÁúČzisyen HÁúČseyin Kenan GÁúČn'ÁúČn ŤéĹocukluŤáíu nÁúČfuzlu bir adam olan dayŤįčsŤįč Saib PaŤČßazade'nin yanŤįčnda zorluklar iŤéĹinde geŤéĹmiŤČßtir. Saib Bey, onun rŤįčzasŤįč olmadan evlenen kŤįčz kardeŤČßi Melek HanŤįčm'Ťįč hiŤéĹ affetmemiŤČßtir. Melek HanŤįčm, hŤįčrsŤįčzlŤįčk suŤéĹuyla mahkum olan kocasŤįč hapishanede śěölÁúČnce, oŤáílu Kenan ve kŤįčzŤįč Afife'yle ortada kalmŤįčŤČß ve aŤáíabeyinin yanŤįčna sŤįčŤáíŤįčnmŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. Saib bey, etrafa karŤČßŤįč mecburiyetten onlara kucak aŤéĹmŤįčŤČß gibi gśěörÁúČnse de, kŤįčzkardeŤČßinin hatasŤįčnŤįč sÁúČrekli yÁúČzÁúČne vurarak, onlarŤįč barŤįčndŤįčrmakla bÁúČyÁúČk iyilikte bulunduŤáíunu baŤČßlarŤįčna kakarak hayatlarŤįčnŤįč zindana ŤéĹevirmiŤČßtir. DayŤįčsŤįč tarafŤįčndan sÁúČrekli horlanan, itilip kakŤįčlan, hatta hŤįčrsŤįčzlŤįčkla bile suŤéĹlanan Kenan, insanlardan uzak bir derviŤČß gibi yaŤČßayan ŤČ¶em-i Dede'yle tanŤįčŤČßŤįčp, onun neyini dinleyince mÁúČziŤáíe ilgi duymaya baŤČßlamŤįčŤČß, bu konuda yetenekli olduŤáíunu fark etmiŤČßtir. DayŤįčsŤįč onun mÁúČzik eŤáíitimi almasŤįčna ŤČßiddetle karŤČßŤįč ŤéĹŤįčkmŤįčŤČß, liseden sonra mÁúČhendislik eŤáíitimi almasŤįč iŤéĹin Ťįčsrar etmiŤČßtir. MÁúČhendis Kenan'Ťįčn arkasŤįčnda kŤįčrŤįčk bir aŤČßk hikayesi vardŤįčr. Lise arkadaŤČßŤįč Leyla'yŤįč ŤéĹok ama ŤéĹok sevmiŤČßtir, ama Leyla zengin bir ailelenin kŤįčzŤįčdŤįčr. Kenan ise dayŤįčsŤįčnŤįčn yanŤįčnda sŤįčŤáíŤįčntŤįč gibi bÁúČyÁúČyen fakir bir genŤéĹtir. Kenan kendini ona layŤįčk gśěörmediŤáíi iŤéĹin genŤéĹ kŤįčzŤįč reddetmek zorunda kalmŤįčŤČß, bir sene sonra Saib Bey'in oŤáílu Cemil'le niŤČßanlandŤįčŤáíŤįčnŤįč śěöŤáírenmiŤČßtir. ŤĄüok acŤįč ŤéĹekmiŤČßtir Kenan, iŤéĹine kapanmŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. BÁúČtÁúČn hayatŤįčnŤįčn yoksulluk ve baŤČßarŤįčsŤįčzlŤįčklarla geŤéĹeceŤáíine inanmaktadŤįčr. Bu yarŤįčm kalan aŤČßk onun ruhunda kapanmayan yaralar aŤéĹacak, aŤČßka inancŤįčnŤįč yitirecektir. MÁúČhendislik eŤáíitimini tamamlarken mÁúČzikle iliŤČßkisini hiŤéĹ kesmemiŤČß, okulu bitince de mesleŤáíini yapmak yerine mÁúČzik śěöŤáíretmeni olarak ŤéĹalŤįčŤČßmaya baŤČßlamŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. Bir arkadaŤČßŤįčnŤįčn tavsiyesiyle Avrupa'ya giderek mÁúČzik eŤáíitimini ilerletmeye karar verir. Bu arada kŤįčz kardeŤČßi Afife evlenmiŤČßtir. Melek HanŤįčm elinde kalan son mal varlŤįčŤáíŤįč kÁúČŤéĹÁúČk bir dÁúČkkanŤįč satarak, oŤáílunu Avrupa'ya gśěönderir. YŤįčllar sonra HÁúČseyin Kenan'Ťįčn bÁúČyÁúČdÁúČŤáíÁúČ eve dśěönÁúČŤČßÁúČ muhteŤČßem olur. O artŤįčk, ŤČßarkŤįčlarŤįč dillerden dÁúČŤČßmeyen ÁúČnlÁúČ bir mÁúČzisyendir. Belediye BaŤČßkanlŤįčŤáíŤįčna oynayan dayŤįčsŤįč, ŤČßimdi onunla gurur duymakta, ŤČßśěöhretinden kendine pay ŤéĹŤįčkartmakta, Kenan'Ťįč yere gśěöŤáíe sŤįčŤáídŤįčramamaktadŤįčr. ŤČ¶imdi DayŤįčsŤįčnŤįčn OŤáílu Cemil'le mutsuz bir evliliŤáíi olan Leyla ise piŤČßmandŤįčr. Cemil, geŤéĹmiŤČßte kalan bu aŤČßk hikayesini bilmemektedir. Onun baŤČßarŤįčsŤįčnŤįč kŤįčskanmaktadŤįčr.

Kenan da ŤéĹok deŤáíiŤČßmiŤČßtir, ÁúČnlÁúČ olmanŤįčn bÁúČtÁúČn nimetlerinden yararlanmaktadŤįčr. KomŤČßularŤįčndan evli kadŤįčn olan Nimet HanŤįčm'Ťįčn ilgisine karŤČßŤįčlŤįčk verir. Nimet HanŤįčm Kenan'la buluŤČßmaya giderken, dikkat ŤéĹekmemek iŤéĹin, Lamia'yŤįč da yanŤįčnda gśěötÁúČrmektedir. Lamia uzak akrabalarŤįčnŤįčn yanŤįčnda bÁúČyÁúČyen yetim bir genŤéĹ kŤįčzdŤįčr. HÁúČseyin Kenan hayranŤįčdŤįčr. Kendi rŤįčzasŤįč bile sorulmadan, akrabalarŤįčnŤįčn takdiriyle niŤČßanlandŤįčŤáíŤįč gencin askerliŤáíinin bitmesini beklemektedir. Evin bÁúČtÁúČn iŤČßi omuzlarŤįčndadŤįčr. Nimet HanŤįčmŤįčn onu yanŤįčnda taŤČßŤįčma sebebini bildiŤáíi halde iŤČßten gÁúČŤéĹten ve pek de sevilmediŤáíi bu evden ara sŤįčra uzaklaŤČßmak Lamia'ya da iyi gelir, ama bu durum zamanla Lamia'ya acŤįč vermeye baŤČßlar. Lamia Kenan'a aŤČßŤįčk olmuŤČßtur.

programme.title: Yeni Gelin

programme.title: AŤČßk Laftan Anlamaz

programme.title: Dudaktan Kalbe
programme.desc:
ŤĄļnlÁúČ mÁúČzisyen HÁúČseyin Kenan GÁúČn'ÁúČn ŤéĹocukluŤáíu nÁúČfuzlu bir adam olan dayŤįčsŤįč Saib PaŤČßazade'nin yanŤįčnda zorluklar iŤéĹinde geŤéĹmiŤČßtir. Saib Bey, onun rŤįčzasŤįč olmadan evlenen kŤįčz kardeŤČßi Melek HanŤįčm'Ťįč hiŤéĹ affetmemiŤČßtir. Melek HanŤįčm, hŤįčrsŤįčzlŤįčk suŤéĹuyla mahkum olan kocasŤįč hapishanede śěölÁúČnce, oŤáílu Kenan ve kŤįčzŤįč Afife'yle ortada kalmŤįčŤČß ve aŤáíabeyinin yanŤįčna sŤįčŤáíŤįčnmŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. Saib bey, etrafa karŤČßŤįč mecburiyetten onlara kucak aŤéĹmŤįčŤČß gibi gśěörÁúČnse de, kŤįčzkardeŤČßinin hatasŤįčnŤįč sÁúČrekli yÁúČzÁúČne vurarak, onlarŤįč barŤįčndŤįčrmakla bÁúČyÁúČk iyilikte bulunduŤáíunu baŤČßlarŤįčna kakarak hayatlarŤįčnŤįč zindana ŤéĹevirmiŤČßtir. DayŤįčsŤįč tarafŤįčndan sÁúČrekli horlanan, itilip kakŤįčlan, hatta hŤįčrsŤįčzlŤįčkla bile suŤéĹlanan Kenan, insanlardan uzak bir derviŤČß gibi yaŤČßayan ŤČ¶em-i Dede'yle tanŤįčŤČßŤįčp, onun neyini dinleyince mÁúČziŤáíe ilgi duymaya baŤČßlamŤįčŤČß, bu konuda yetenekli olduŤáíunu fark etmiŤČßtir. DayŤįčsŤįč onun mÁúČzik eŤáíitimi almasŤįčna ŤČßiddetle karŤČßŤįč ŤéĹŤįčkmŤįčŤČß, liseden sonra mÁúČhendislik eŤáíitimi almasŤįč iŤéĹin Ťįčsrar etmiŤČßtir. MÁúČhendis Kenan'Ťįčn arkasŤįčnda kŤįčrŤįčk bir aŤČßk hikayesi vardŤįčr. Lise arkadaŤČßŤįč Leyla'yŤįč ŤéĹok ama ŤéĹok sevmiŤČßtir, ama Leyla zengin bir ailelenin kŤįčzŤįčdŤįčr. Kenan ise dayŤįčsŤįčnŤįčn yanŤįčnda sŤįčŤáíŤįčntŤįč gibi bÁúČyÁúČyen fakir bir genŤéĹtir. Kenan kendini ona layŤįčk gśěörmediŤáíi iŤéĹin genŤéĹ kŤįčzŤįč reddetmek zorunda kalmŤįčŤČß, bir sene sonra Saib Bey'in oŤáílu Cemil'le niŤČßanlandŤįčŤáíŤįčnŤįč śěöŤáírenmiŤČßtir. ŤĄüok acŤįč ŤéĹekmiŤČßtir Kenan, iŤéĹine kapanmŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. BÁúČtÁúČn hayatŤįčnŤįčn yoksulluk ve baŤČßarŤįčsŤįčzlŤįčklarla geŤéĹeceŤáíine inanmaktadŤįčr. Bu yarŤįčm kalan aŤČßk onun ruhunda kapanmayan yaralar aŤéĹacak, aŤČßka inancŤįčnŤįč yitirecektir. MÁúČhendislik eŤáíitimini tamamlarken mÁúČzikle iliŤČßkisini hiŤéĹ kesmemiŤČß, okulu bitince de mesleŤáíini yapmak yerine mÁúČzik śěöŤáíretmeni olarak ŤéĹalŤįčŤČßmaya baŤČßlamŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. Bir arkadaŤČßŤįčnŤįčn tavsiyesiyle Avrupa'ya giderek mÁúČzik eŤáíitimini ilerletmeye karar verir. Bu arada kŤįčz kardeŤČßi Afife evlenmiŤČßtir. Melek HanŤįčm elinde kalan son mal varlŤįčŤáíŤįč kÁúČŤéĹÁúČk bir dÁúČkkanŤįč satarak, oŤáílunu Avrupa'ya gśěönderir. YŤįčllar sonra HÁúČseyin Kenan'Ťįčn bÁúČyÁúČdÁúČŤáíÁúČ eve dśěönÁúČŤČßÁúČ muhteŤČßem olur. O artŤįčk, ŤČßarkŤįčlarŤįč dillerden dÁúČŤČßmeyen ÁúČnlÁúČ bir mÁúČzisyendir. Belediye BaŤČßkanlŤįčŤáíŤįčna oynayan dayŤįčsŤįč, ŤČßimdi onunla gurur duymakta, ŤČßśěöhretinden kendine pay ŤéĹŤįčkartmakta, Kenan'Ťįč yere gśěöŤáíe sŤįčŤáídŤįčramamaktadŤįčr. ŤČ¶imdi DayŤįčsŤįčnŤįčn OŤáílu Cemil'le mutsuz bir evliliŤáíi olan Leyla ise piŤČßmandŤįčr. Cemil, geŤéĹmiŤČßte kalan bu aŤČßk hikayesini bilmemektedir. Onun baŤČßarŤįčsŤįčnŤįč kŤįčskanmaktadŤįčr.

Kenan da ŤéĹok deŤáíiŤČßmiŤČßtir, ÁúČnlÁúČ olmanŤįčn bÁúČtÁúČn nimetlerinden yararlanmaktadŤįčr. KomŤČßularŤįčndan evli kadŤįčn olan Nimet HanŤįčm'Ťįčn ilgisine karŤČßŤįčlŤįčk verir. Nimet HanŤįčm Kenan'la buluŤČßmaya giderken, dikkat ŤéĹekmemek iŤéĹin, Lamia'yŤįč da yanŤįčnda gśěötÁúČrmektedir. Lamia uzak akrabalarŤįčnŤįčn yanŤįčnda bÁúČyÁúČyen yetim bir genŤéĹ kŤįčzdŤįčr. HÁúČseyin Kenan hayranŤįčdŤįčr. Kendi rŤįčzasŤįč bile sorulmadan, akrabalarŤįčnŤįčn takdiriyle niŤČßanlandŤįčŤáíŤįč gencin askerliŤáíinin bitmesini beklemektedir. Evin bÁúČtÁúČn iŤČßi omuzlarŤįčndadŤįčr. Nimet HanŤįčmŤįčn onu yanŤįčnda taŤČßŤįčma sebebini bildiŤáíi halde iŤČßten gÁúČŤéĹten ve pek de sevilmediŤáíi bu evden ara sŤįčra uzaklaŤČßmak Lamia'ya da iyi gelir, ama bu durum zamanla Lamia'ya acŤįč vermeye baŤČßlar. Lamia Kenan'a aŤČßŤįčk olmuŤČßtur.

programme.desc: Tutku, aŤČßk ve kaderle śěörÁúČlÁúČ bir hesaplaŤČßma ve umut hikayesi.

Kenan ise dayŤįčsŤįčnŤįčn yanŤįčnda sŤįčŤáíŤįčntŤįč gibi bÁúČyÁúČyen fakir bir genŤéĹtir. Kenan kendini ona layŤįčk gśěörmediŤáíi iŤéĹin genŤéĹ kŤįčzŤįč reddetmek zorunda kalmŤįčŤČß, bir sene sonra Saib Bey'in oŤáílu Cemil'le niŤČßanlandŤįčŤáíŤįčnŤįč śěöŤáírenmiŤČßtir. ŤĄüok acŤįč ŤéĹekmiŤČßtir Kenan, iŤéĹine kapanmŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. BÁúČtÁúČn hayatŤįčnŤįčn yoksulluk ve baŤČßarŤįčsŤįčzlŤįčklarla geŤéĹeceŤáíine inanmaktadŤįčr. Bu yarŤįčm kalan aŤČßk onun ruhunda kapanmayan yaralar aŤéĹacak, aŤČßka inancŤįčnŤįč yitirecektir. MÁúČhendislik eŤáíitimini tamamlarken mÁúČzikle iliŤČßkisini hiŤéĹ kesmemiŤČß, okulu bitince de mesleŤáíini yapmak yerine mÁúČzik śěöŤáíretmeni olarak ŤéĹalŤįčŤČßmaya baŤČßlamŤįčŤČßtŤįčr. Bir arkadaŤČßŤįčnŤįčn tavsiyesiyle Avrupa'ya giderek mÁúČzik eŤáíitimini ilerletmeye karar verir. Bu arada kŤįčz kardeŤČßi Afife evlenmiŤČßtir. Melek HanŤįčm elinde kalan son mal varlŤįčŤáíŤįč kÁúČŤéĹÁúČk bir dÁúČkkanŤįč satarak, oŤáílunu Avrupa'ya gśěönderir. YŤįčllar sonra HÁúČseyin Kenan'Ťįčn bÁúČyÁúČdÁúČŤáíÁúČ eve dśěönÁúČŤČßÁúČ muhteŤČßem olur. O artŤįčk, ŤČßarkŤįčlarŤįč dillerden dÁúČŤČßmeyen ÁúČnlÁúČ bir mÁúČzisyendir. Belediye BaŤČßkanlŤįčŤáíŤįčna oynayan dayŤįčsŤįč, ŤČßimdi onunla gurur duymakta, ŤČßśěöhretinden kendine pay ŤéĹŤįčkartmakta, Kenan'Ťįč yere gśěöŤáíe sŤįčŤáídŤįčramamaktadŤįčr. ŤČ¶imdi DayŤįčsŤįčnŤįčn OŤáílu Cemil'le mutsuz bir evliliŤáíi olan Leyla ise piŤČßmandŤįčr. Cemil, geŤéĹmiŤČßte kalan bu aŤČßk hikayesini bilmemektedir. Onun baŤČßarŤįčsŤįčnŤįč kŤįčskanmaktadŤįčr.

Kenan da ŤéĹok deŤáíiŤČßmiŤČßtir, ÁúČnlÁúČ olmanŤįčn bÁúČtÁúČn nimetlerinden yararlanmaktadŤįčr. KomŤČßularŤįčndan evli kadŤįčn olan Nimet HanŤįčm'Ťįčn ilgisine karŤČßŤįčlŤįčk verir. Nimet HanŤįčm Kenan'la buluŤČßmaya giderken, dikkat ŤéĹekmemek iŤéĹin, Lamia'yŤįč da yanŤįčnda gśěötÁúČrmektedir. Lamia uzak akrabalarŤįčnŤįčn yanŤįčnda bÁúČyÁúČyen yetim bir genŤéĹ kŤįčzdŤįčr. HÁúČseyin Kenan hayranŤįčdŤįčr. Kendi rŤįčzasŤįč bile sorulmadan, akrabalarŤįčnŤįčn takdiriyle niŤČßanlandŤįčŤáíŤįč gencin askerliŤáíinin bitmesini beklemektedir. Evin bÁúČtÁúČn iŤČßi omuzlarŤįčndadŤįčr. Nimet HanŤįčmŤįčn onu yanŤįčnda taŤČßŤįčma sebebini bildiŤáíi halde iŤČßten gÁúČŤéĹten ve pek de sevilmediŤáíi bu evden ara sŤįčra uzaklaŤČßmak Lamia'ya da iyi gelir, ama bu durum zamanla Lamia'ya acŤįč vermeye baŤČßlar. Lamia Kenan'a aŤČßŤįčk olmuŤČßtur.

programme.title: Mondo Yan
programme.desc: Mondo Yan, renkli dÁúČnyasŤįč ve enerjik hikŤäíyeleriyle dostluk, paylaŤČßma ve hayal gÁúČcÁúČnÁúČ eŤáílenceli maceralarla anlatan bir animasyon dizisidir.

programme.title: Leliko
programme.desc: Leliko, neŤČßeli karakterleri ve eŤáílenceli hikŤäíyeleriyle ŤéĹocuklara dostluk, paylaŤČßma ve problem ŤéĹśěözme deŤáíerlerini aktaran animasyon serisidir.

programme.title: Origami YapŤįčyoruz
programme.desc: Origami YapŤįčyoruz, ŤéĹocuklara kaŤáíŤįčt katlamanŤįčn inceliklerini śěöŤáíreten eŤáílenceli bir programdŤįčr. Basit adŤįčmlarla hayvanlar, nesneler ve figÁúČrler yapŤįčlŤįčrken el becerisi ve hayal gÁúČcÁúČ geliŤČßir.

programme.title: Cico ile Moco
programme.desc: Cico ve Moco, her gÁúČn yeni ŤČßeyler keŤČßfeden iki sevimli dosttur. EŤáílenceli oyunlar, kÁúČŤéĹÁúČk sÁúČrprizler ve neŤČßeli maceralarla śěöŤáírenmeyi keyifli hale getirirler.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BOSAI:Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: 100 years ago, on September 1, 1923, a major earthquake struck Japan. The Great Kanto Earthquake left an estimated 105,000 people dead or missing, yet most of the victims perished in fires. Why?

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Due to global warming, the bamboo habitat range in Japan is expanding and abandoned bamboo groves are encroaching on forests and farmland nationwide. How should we associate with this iconic plant?

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Amami Oshima is a World Natural Heritage Site, with rare flora and fauna including many endemic species. Explore the biodiversity of its lush, subtropical forests in stunning time-lapse footage.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to sleep. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #23 I like this cat. / To express what you like, say the name of a person, place, or thing and "ga suki desu."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: In response to a serious labor shortage, Japan's taxi industry is hiring more and more foreign drivers. The program introduces the efforts by both the government and taxi companies to facilitate this.

programme.title: HELLO!NHK WORLD JAPAN
programme.desc: We introduce the English-language versions of two "edutainment" programs for kids: The Wakey Show, with DJ Wakey and a cast of puppets, and I Love 'Mee', an animation exploring everyday questions.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: A high school allows students with international roots to use their native language while learning Japanese. Teachers hope it will help them build confidence and adapt better to their environment.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Journeys in Japan
programme.desc: Food writer David Conklin gets up close to the Buddhas and gods of the mystical Kunisaki Peninsula, visits with locals, and experiences a scintillating fire festival.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE<NY>
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Dining with the Chef
programme.desc: Traditional techniques and resourceful recipes! Chefs Saito, Rika, and a lineup of master chefs share their unique approaches to Japanese cooking.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Document 72 hours
programme.desc: Bonsai is a living art form that requires attention to detail and patience. For three days, we asked visitors to a hub of bonsai nurseries near Tokyo about the appeal of bonsai in a fast-paced world.

programme.desc: 1 in 50 families have lost a child during pregnancy or soon after birth. A couple who lost their second son when two hours old talks about their grief and sorrow, a topic often not discussed in Japan.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: Japan in Focus
programme.desc: A construction firm in Hokkaido pours efforts into restoring old Japanese-style houses. They're also dedicated to preserving the traditional methods used to build those homes that can last centuries.

programme.title: Document 72 hours
programme.desc: Bonsai is a living art form that requires attention to detail and patience. For three days, we asked visitors to a hub of bonsai nurseries near Tokyo about the appeal of bonsai in a fast-paced world.

programme.title: BOSAI:Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: 100 years ago, on September 1, 1923, a major earthquake struck Japan. The Great Kanto Earthquake left an estimated 105,000 people dead or missing, yet most of the victims perished in fires. Why?

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Due to global warming, the bamboo habitat range in Japan is expanding and abandoned bamboo groves are encroaching on forests and farmland nationwide. How should we associate with this iconic plant?

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Amami Oshima is a World Natural Heritage Site, with rare flora and fauna including many endemic species. Explore the biodiversity of its lush, subtropical forests in stunning time-lapse footage.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato

programme.title: One in Every Japanese
programme.desc: 1 in 45 Japanese are suspected of a gambling addiction. We follow a man who made a clean break from gambling, overcoming the crisis of a broken family, and is in the recovery process from addiction.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We visit one of the most famous cherry blossom spots in Edo. Flower viewing parties were for eating, drinking and making merry. It was also an opportunity for young men and women to mingle.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: A high school allows students with international roots to use their native language while learning Japanese. Teachers hope it will help them build confidence and adapt better to their environment.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.
